latest.title: Agreement for Texas bitcoin project
latest.content:
Today 07:00
RNS Number : 5591B
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
23 April 2026
23 April 2026
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
("BMV" or the "Company")
Agreement for Texas bitcoin project
Project expected to deliver first ever revenues for BMV
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd (LSE: BMV), the gold streaming and treasury company, is pleased to announce that it has entered into an agreement with Digital Carpenters, the data centre services and solutions provider, to invest in a 4.8MW bitcoin mining project located in Texas, USA (the "Texas Project").
Highlights:
·
Completed initial investment into 4.8MW bitcoin mining project, establishing the commercial framework, with a planned total investment of c.US$2.3m over three years
·
Structured to provide contracted and stable cash flows on a daily basis
·
Expected to deliver the Company's first revenues in the coming weeks
Under the terms of the agreement, the initial investment has been completed and BMV has the option to invest approximately US$2.3m over a three-year period in the Texas Project. The Texas Project provides exposure to bitcoin-linked cash flows through a structured and contracted framework and is designed to generate consistent revenues from mining operations supported by established infrastructure.
The investment demonstrates the speed at which BMV can deploy capital and generate cash flows and returns. The Company intends that such cash flows will be recycled within its treasury operations to generate additional yield.
The Texas Project represents the first execution of the Company's strategy to build a portfolio of gold and bitcoin-linked cash flow opportunities through contracted exposure. The Board believes this approach offers rapid deployment of capital into yielding assets, predictable near-term revenue generation, exposure to Bitcoin, and the ability to reinvest cash flows for further returns.
Digital Carpenters provides end-to-end mining operations to help its partners grow their Bitcoin enterprises, delivering full-spectrum data centre operations from site feasibility and design to procurement, commissioning, and daily operations.
Capital from the fundraise announced on 15 April 2026 which is not deployed into the Texas Project is expected to be held in treasury as bitcoin or tether gold and then deployed into yield generating strategies in due course.
Sath Ganesarajah, Chief Executive Officer of BMV, said:
"The agreement with Digital Carpenters is a landmark moment for BMV as we transition into a revenue generating business. It demonstrates both the strength of our pipeline and our ability to rapidly deploy capital into structured, near-term cash yielding opportunities. We believe this strategy positions BMV to deliver scalable and repeatable returns for shareholders."
For further information, please contact:
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
Sath Ganesarajah, Chief Executive Officer
c/o +44 (0)20 4582 3500
Gracechurch Group
Harry Chathli, Alexis Gore, Anysia Virdi
+44 (0)20 4582 3500
About Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
Bluebird Mining Ventures (LSE: BMV) is a gold streaming, mining and treasury company. The Company's mission is to build and manage a gold-backed treasury through streaming agreements, providing investors with exposure to physical gold without the operational risk of mining.
BMV focuses on streams from producing assets within the ore concentrate to bullion value chain. Its investments secure multi-year flows of gold that can be recycled into new transactions. This model enables scalable exposure to gold without capital expenditure, or execution risks.
Drawing on its heritage in gold, BMV combines the stability of physical bullion with the benefits of a scalable, disciplined business model. With a focus on prudent capital allocation and treasury management, BMV aims to deliver sustainable, long-term value for shareholders.
For more information, please visit: www.bmvbtc.com
About Digital Carpenters
Digital Carpenters operates the most power-dense data centre in the world. We specialize in designing and developing custom immersion cooling applications to meet the needs of your data centre, bitcoin mine or other high-powered computing application. We are currently focused on bringing these same technologies to disrupt the energy sector with a focus on methane recapture and self power generation for data centres.
This information is provided by RNS, the news service of the London Stock Exchange. RNS is approved by the Financial Conduct Authority to act as a Primary Information Provider in the United Kingdom. Terms and conditions relating to the use and distribution of this information may apply. For further information, please contact
rns@lseg.com

latest.title: Fundraise of £750,000
latest.content:
Today 07:00
RNS Number : 4806A
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
15 April 2026
15 April 2026
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
("BMV" or the "Company")
Fundraise of £750,000
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd (LSE: BMV), the gold streaming and treasury company, i
s pleased to announce the completion of a fundraise to raise £750,000 through a placing (the "Fundraise").
Fundraise and Use of Proceeds
The Company has completed a fundraise of a total of £750,000
before expenses, by way of issue of 750,000,000 new ordinary shares in the capital of the Company at 0.1 pence per share
("Placing")
. The funds were raised via a Placement with CMC Markets UK Plc ("CMC"), trading as CMC CapX.
The proceeds will be used to progress BMV's pipeline and investment into hard assets that will bring value to the Company.
BMV has continued its progress across its investment pipeline and treasury platform, as it transitions from infrastructure build-out to active capital deployment.
As announced on 14 April 2026, BMV is in advanced discussions across a range of opportunities targeting short-duration paybacks and high returns. The Company is progressing with a range of asset-backed opportunities across gold streaming, bitcoin infrastructure, and powered land, alongside establishing a treasury capability designed to enhance returns through disciplined capital deployment.
Admission and Total Voting Rights
Application will be made for Admission of the 750,000,000 new ordinary shares, which will rank
pari passu
in all respects with the existing ordinary shares in the Company, which is expected to occur at 8.00 a.m. on or around 17 April 2026.
Following Admission, the Company's issued share capital will consist of 2,857,000,804. This figure may be used by shareholders in the Company as the denominator for the calculations by which they will determine if they are required to notify their interest in, or a change to their interest in, the share capital of the Company under the FCA's Disclosure and Transparency Rules.
Sath Ganesarajah, Chief Executive Officer of BMV, said:
"This fundraise demonstrates confidence and support from investors in our gold streaming and treasury strategy. As we continue to progress discussions on a number of exciting opportunities, the funds raised will be used exclusively for hard asset investment that will grow our net asset value."
For further information, please contact:
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
Sath Ganesarajah, Chief Executive Officer
c/o +44 (0)20 4582 3500
Gracechurch Group
Harry Chathli, Alexis Gore, Anysia Virdi
+44 (0)20 4582 3500
About Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
Bluebird Mining Ventures (LSE: BMV) is a gold streaming, mining and treasury company. The Company's mission is to build and manage a gold-backed treasury through streaming agreements, providing investors with exposure to physical gold without the operational risk of mining.
BMV focuses on streams from producing assets within the ore concentrate to bullion value chain. Its investments secure multi-year flows of gold that can be recycled into new transactions. This model enables scalable exposure to gold without capital expenditure, or execution risks.
Drawing on its heritage in gold, BMV combines the stability of physical bullion with the benefits of a scalable, disciplined business model. With a focus on prudent capital allocation and treasury management, BMV aims to deliver sustainable, long-term value for shareholders.
For more information, please visit: www.bmvbtc.com

latest.title: Business Update
latest.content:
Today 07:00
RNS Number : 2812A
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
14 April 2026
14 April 2026
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
("BMV" or the "Company")
Business Update
Pipeline Progress and Treasury Deployment Update
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd (LSE: BMV), the gold streaming and treasury company, is pleased to provide the following update ahead of its Final Results for the 12-month period ended 31 December 2025, which the Company expects to publish by the end of April 2026.
BMV has continued its progress across its investment pipeline and treasury platform, marking the transition from infrastructure build-out to active capital deployment.
Deal Pipeline Progressing
BMV is in advanced discussions across a range of opportunities targeting short-duration paybacks and high returns. The Company is advancing a portfolio of asset-backed opportunities across gold streaming, bitcoin infrastructure, and powered land, alongside establishing a treasury capability designed to enhance returns through disciplined capital deployment.
Gold Streaming and Raptor Capital International Ltd ("Raptor") Partnership
BMV, in partnership with Raptor, is engaged across a pipeline of gold-streaming opportunities.
The Company is progressing a secured gold streaming transaction over the Crawford Gold Project in Western Australia. The transaction is expected to have the following key parameters:
·
US$15M investment securing delivery of 6,265 oz over c.24 months
·
Payback: c.11.5 months
·
Internal Rate of Return ("
IRR"): c.130%
The asset is a development ready open pit free dig gold mine recovering the gold through a heap leach process, enabling low capital intensity and rapid cash flow generation. The investment is structured with senior security, including asset-level collateral and step-in rights. The Company will provide further details on the transaction as and when appropriate.
In addition, BMV is engaged across a broader pipeline in partnership with Raptor, comprising approximately:
·
2.0Moz resource base
·
55,000 oz potential delivery
·
276M indicative value
BMV's focus remains on short-duration, production or near-production assets. Raptor provides innovative finance to medium scale mining operations enabling them to initiate or increase production. The team has decades of experience in the mining industry, financing, building and operating precious and base metal mines.
Bitcoin Infrastructure Opportunities
BMV is also progressing a portfolio of bitcoin-linked cash flow opportunities across infrastructure and contracted exposure:
·
Texas, USA (4.8MW mining): c.US$2.3M investment over three years, generating c.US$2.5M annual revenue (c.13% IRR), providing stable contracted cash flow
·
British Columbia, Canada (3MW hydro): c.US$3.35M annual revenue (c.47% IRR), scalable, power-advantaged operation
·
Pennsylvania, USA (infrastructure operator): c.US$61.2M annual revenue (c.73% IRR), higher-return infrastructure exposure
·
Hashrate contracts: US$100k-$500k tickets over approximately six months, targeting around c.15-40% returns, enabling short-duration capital rotation
Powered Land
The Company is also advancing opportunities to acquire and develop energy-enabled land positions, targeting value creation through power access and infrastructure development.
Treasury Platform and Infrastructure established
BMV has established its core treasury infrastructure, including custody, exchange connectivity, and on-chain execution capability. Initial transactions have been completed to validate execution, settlement, and risk controls. The platform is now operational and being deployed alongside the Company's investment activities.
BMV's treasury is structured around three core assets:
·
Bitcoin as the primary productive reserve
·
Tether Gold (XAUT) providing tokenised gold exposure with yield optionality
·
Physical gold as an unencumbered balance sheet anchor
The Company selectively deploys capital across lending, market-neutral strategies, liquidity provision, and structured products. Indicative yields achieved to date include approximately 4% on physical gold lending and approximately 20% on Tether Gold structured products.
Integrated Model
BMV's approach combines:
·
Origination of asset-backed cash flows
·
Capture of proceeds within treasury
·
Redeployment into yield strategies
·
Recycling of capital into new opportunities
This creates a repeatable model designed to enhance returns through continuous capital reuse.
Legacy Assets
The Company continues to undertake a strategic review of its legacy portfolio, comprising historical interests in gold mining assets in Asia. Based on work completed to date, the Board does not currently expect these assets to be monetised in the medium to long term and is therefore exploring potential disposal options. No decisions have been finalised, and further updates will be provided as appropriate.
Sath Ganesarajah, Chief Executive Officer of BMV, said:
"We have made strong progress across our pipeline as we execute our gold streaming and treasury strategy. BMV is in advanced discussions on a number of potential transactions that meet our criteria of short-duration paybacks and attractive returns. Our focus remains on closing these pipeline opportunities, scaling our treasury deployment, and integrating both into a unified capital framework. Our objective is to build a scalable platform capable of compounding capital through a combination of asset ownership and active treasury management. We look forward to updating the market as these opportunities progress."
While the Board believes BMV has a strong pipeline of opportunities, there can be no guarantee at this stage that any of the above transactions will be completed.
For further information, please contact:
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
Sath Ganesarajah, Chief Executive Officer
c/o +44 (0)20 4582 3500
Gracechurch Group
Harry Chathli, Alexis Gore, Anysia Virdi
+44 (0)20 4582 3500
About Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
Bluebird Mining Ventures (LSE: BMV) is a gold streaming, mining and treasury company. The Company's mission is to build and manage a gold-backed treasury through streaming agreements, providing investors with exposure to physical gold without the operational risk of mining.
BMV focuses on streams from producing assets within the ore concentrate to bullion value chain. Its investments secure multi-year flows of gold that can be recycled into new transactions. This model enables scalable exposure to gold without capital expenditure, or execution risks.
Drawing on its heritage in gold, BMV combines the stability of physical bullion with the benefits of a scalable, disciplined business model. With a focus on prudent capital allocation and treasury management, BMV aims to deliver sustainable, long-term value for shareholders.
For more information, please visit: www.bmvbtc.com
This information is provided by RNS, the news service of the London Stock Exchange. RNS is approved by the Financial Conduct Authority to act as a Primary Information Provider in the United Kingdom. Terms and conditions relating to the use and distribution of this information may apply. For further information, please contact

company_30s.what_they_do: BMV Ltd. is a small, London‑listed company that builds and operates Bitcoin mining infrastructure, with a recent focus on a new Texas‑based mining facility.
company_30s.why_they_matter: Bitcoin mining is a growing sector as demand for the cryptocurrency and its underlying blockchain technology rises. A Texas operation gives the firm a cost‑effective, energy‑rich location and positions it to tap into the U.S. market, potentially giving it a competitive edge over overseas miners.
company_30s.current_state: The company is in a fundraising phase, having raised £750,000 to support its Texas project. Leadership changes and new management incentives show an attempt to strengthen governance, but the business is still in a pre‑revenue or early‑revenue stage. The share price is near zero, reflecting a deep decline from its prior highs.

rns_narrative: The company has been busy securing capital and expanding its operations – a £750k raise followed by a Texas bitcoin project announcement signals a clear growth push.
Governance is being tightened: director changes, new advisory committees, and management incentives aim to align interests and reassure investors.
Several updates hint at a shift from a cash‑burning start‑up to a more structured, project‑driven entity, but no earnings or revenue data yet.

crowd_tape.dominant_theme: A quiet, low‑engagement environment where most chatter is neutral or mildly optimistic about the Texas venture.
crowd_tape.bull_narrative: A handful of traders are quietly buying or recommending the stock as a hidden gem tied to a new mining site.
crowd_tape.bear_narrative: Some voices warn that the company may never generate revenue, citing the lack of past performance and the high costs of mining.
crowd_tape.sentiment_shift: The mood remains flat; no surge in activity suggests the market is still waiting for a clear catalyst.

whats_happening_now.attention_check: Google Trends is flat, meaning no public buzz – the best scenario for a surprise move if a catalyst surfaces.

near_term_catalysts: Completion of the £750k fundraise and the first operational milestones of the Texas mining plant.
Positive updates on regulatory approvals or energy contracts that would lower operating costs.
Any announcement of revenue generation or a partnership with a larger mining operator.
expect_next.watch_for: Look for a sudden spike in daily trading volume, a clear support level holding, and any mention of a new capital injection or partnership in the next 60–90 days.
expect_next.timing_regime: The company appears to be in the very early part of a recovery cycle – capitulation has likely finished, but the mean‑reversion engine is still idle until a concrete event triggers buying.

buy_vs_sell.lean: Neutral – not enough evidence of a decisive catalyst or a proven bounce pattern.
buy_vs_sell.bull_case: If the Texas project gets off the ground and the company starts generating cash flow, the stock could climb to the midpoint of its 52‑week range, roughly doubling the current price. The deep drop creates a steep upside if the market finally values the asset correctly.
buy_vs_sell.bear_case: The biggest risk is that the project stalls, the fundraise fails, or the company cannot cover operating costs, leaving the share price stuck or falling further. A realistic downside is a drop to the current price level, with no immediate recovery.
buy_vs_sell.risk_reward: Potential upside: up to 200% if the price reaches the 52‑week midpoint. Potential downside: limited to the current price, as the stock cannot go below zero. The asymmetry is moderate but hinges on the success of the Texas venture.

playbook.if_bullish: Enter when the share price consolidates around the 20‑day moving average and volume exceeds the 10‑day average by 30%. Use a stop just below the recent low to protect against a brief dip, and consider scaling in as the price approaches the 52‑week midpoint.
playbook.if_watching: Hold until you see a volume spike of at least 50% above the 10‑day average or a public announcement that the Texas facility is operational. These signals would confirm that the mean‑reversion engine is starting.
playbook.if_passing: Not applicable – there are no clear delisting or bankruptcy risks at present.

ai_insights.bottom_line: BMV Ltd. is a small, quietly funded Bitcoin miner eyeing a Texas expansion; its deep crash offers a potential upside, but the next catalyst is still pending.
